message:
🐛 Fix RemediationConsole calling non-existent /api/shell/exec endpoint (#2733)

Fixes #2642. The RemediationConsole shell tab called POST /api/shell/exec
which was never implemented -- the backend only has a WebSocket endpoint
at /ws/exec for interactive pod exec sessions.

Replaced the broken endpoint call with MCP ops tool calls via the
existing /api/mcp/tools/ops/call endpoint. kubectl commands from the
shell tab (get pods, describe pod, logs, events, etc.) are now mapped
to their corresponding MCP tool names (get_pods, describe_pod,
get_pod_logs, get_events, etc.) using authFetch for proper JWT auth.

Unsupported commands show a clear message instead of silently failing.
When the MCP bridge is unavailable, the existing simulated output
fallback is preserved.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
